---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect or unexpected behaviour
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Reproduction

```bash
# Minimal command(s) to reproduce
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include stack traces, log snippets, or screenshots.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python: [e.g. 3.11.4]
- Package version: [e.g. 0.3.0]
- Commit SHA: [e.g. `2cf92e7`]

## Severity

- [ ] Blocks model run
- [ ] Wrong result without raising
- [ ] Cosmetic / docs only
